source_jobs.description:
<p><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph" data-ccp-parastyle-defn="{&quot;ObjectId&quot;:&quot;aaed607e-c2a3-5841-9fb4-41037bfa0faf|1&quot;,&quot;ClassId&quot;:1073872969,&quot;Properties&quot;:[469777841,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,469777842,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,469777844,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,469769226,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,268442635,&quot;24&quot;,134245417,&quot;true&quot;,469777843,&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,469775450,&quot;paragraph&quot;,201340122,&quot;2&quot;,134233614,&quot;true&quot;,469778129,&quot;paragraph&quot;,335572020,&quot;1&quot;,134233118,&quot;true&quot;,134233117,&quot;true&quot;,469778324,&quot;Normal&quot;]}">Position Summary</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">:</span> </span></strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">We are seeking a dedicated </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">Clinic Administrator to </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">lead our f</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">ront </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">o</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">ffice </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">operations</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">,</span> <span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">specializing in</span> <span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">administrative excellence</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> and schedule </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">utilization</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> optimization. This role</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> focuses on maximizing patient care hours, supporting therapists in meeting their care expectations, and achieving </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">optimal</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph"> schedule </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">fill</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">.</span> <span data-ccp-parastyle="paragraph">The position reports to the Clinic Manager with a dotted line relationship to the Internal Operations Manager.</span></span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;134245417&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></p>
